channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus.

item.title: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project. n.pr/4vYPjQW
item.content:encoded: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project. n.pr/4vYPjQW

item.title: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigat…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force. n.pr/4wIpIvR
item.content:encoded: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force. n.pr/4wIpIvR

item.title: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycl…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve. n.pr/4eXlIS5
item.content:encoded: For some electric vehicle batteries, it costs more to recycle them than they're worth. That creates all kinds of problems, which a new Colorado law aims to solve. n.pr/4eXlIS5

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)
NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when sh…
item.author: NME (@nme.com)
item.description:
Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when she dropped it, until it was used in an animation. As more singles followed, so did fan-made videos, and after her debut's success, she quit college to focus on music.

Femtanyl are on The Cover: nme.com/the-cover/femtanyl-13-07-2026-3956582
item.content:encoded:
Noelle Mansbridge thought nothing of her debut ‘P3T’ when she dropped it, until it was used in an animation. As more singles followed, so did fan-made videos, and after her debut's success, she quit college to focus on music.

Femtanyl are on The Cover: nme.com/the-cover/femtanyl-13-07-2026-3956582

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimm…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page. n.pr/44uAeL1
item.content:encoded: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page. n.pr/44uAeL1

item.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to h…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health. n.pr/4wBVx9g
item.content:encoded: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health. n.pr/4wBVx9g
